name: Verify that user cannot proceed to checkout with empty last name
Verify that items can be sorted by price from low to high and are displayed in the correct order
Verify that a user cannot log in with invalid credentials and receives an appropriate error message
Verify that user can proceed to checkout with valid information
Verify that the cancel button on the overview page successfully cancels the checkout process and redirects the user back to the cart page
Verify that user cannot proceed to checkout with empty first name
Verify that items can be removed from the cart and are no longer displayed in the cart page
Verify that a user can successfully complete an end-to-end purchase flow, including login, adding products to the cart, checking out, and confirming the order.
Verify that a user cannot log in with a valid username and an empty password and receives an appropriate error message
Verify that user cannot proceed to checkout with empty postal code
Verify that the 'Back Home' button on the order completion page navigates the user back to the home page.
Verify that items can be added to the cart and are displayed correctly in the cart page
Verify that a user can successfully log out from the application and is redirected to the login page
Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid credentials
Verify that the order completion message is displayed correctly after finishing the checkout process.
